subject: [PATCH v3 1/4] mm: bypass mmap_miss heuristic for VM_EXEC readahead

reviews.author: Jan Kara
reviews.summary: No comment provided by Jan Kara in the thread.

2026-04-02.patch_summary: The patch addresses a problem where the mmap_miss heuristic disables VM_EXEC readahead on arm64 due to an inactive decrement path, leading to unnecessary disabling of targeted readahead for contpte mapping.
